subject: Cloudflare - {{ .campaignName }}
preheader: Hi {{ .firstName }}, a security review from Cloudflare is waiting for you
title: Cloudflare Security Review
intros: Hi {{ .firstName }}, you have a pending security review from Cloudflare.
Cloudflare helps build a better Internet by providing security, performance, and reliability services.
outros: If you have questions about this review, contact your Cloudflare account team.
Need help? Reach us at security-reviews@cloudflare.com.
